title: Spike: best-of-N multi-trajectory sampling for architectural tier
description: Behind a flag, generate N solution trajectories for architectural-complexity features, test each, pick the best (Factory multi-model sampling). Measure the lift via eval:harness. Gate to the reasoning tier only (cost).

title: Eval: curate golden trajectory set from the trajectory store
description: Export .automaker/trajectory/* into a labeled corpus; hand-curate a held-out golden set (~15-20 verified features across domain/complexity) with known-good outcomes at .automaker/eval/golden/. Foundation for the replay harness. GH epic #3904.

title: Flywheel: harness-evolver proposer (worktree edit)
description: Meta-agent takes the top failure pattern and proposes a concrete harness/prompt/context edit in an isolated worktree. GH #3905.

title: Flywheel: quantified failure-mode taxonomy report
description: Scheduled job mines blocked+escalated features + statusChangeReason + trajectories into a quantified failure-mode taxonomy (counts/%), surfaced in the ops dashboard. Depends on the trajectory corpus. GH #3905.

title: Eval: scorecard schema + committed baseline + PR-vs-main diff
description: Define the scorecard schema; commit a baseline from main; build a diff tool comparing PR-branch scores to baseline with tolerances. GH #3904.

title: Flywheel: eval-gated auto-PR (regression-clean only)
description: Proposer evals its edit via eval:harness and opens a PR only if regression-clean + success-positive; else escalate. Opt-in. Depends on the proposer + the CI gate. GH #3905.

title: Eval: CI regression gate on pipeline-touching PRs
description: CI job runs eval:harness on PRs touching lead-engineer-*/processors/prompts/workflow-settings and fails on success-rate/escalation regression beyond tolerance. Wire into checks workflow. GH #3904.

title: Verifier: agent-callable trace self-query tool
description: MCP/tool returning structured telemetry for the current feature run so the execute agent can detect tool-call loops, confirm behavior, and self-correct before exit. GH #3906.

title: Decompose monolithic CLAUDE.md into composable phase-scoped skills
description: Split CLAUDE.md into composable context/skill units loaded by phase/task relevance; CLAUDE.md becomes a thin index. No loss of recovery runbooks. GH #3907.

title: Init br (beads) in a repo via the UI Beads view
description: The Beads view should let a user initialize beads in a repo that doesn't yet have a .beads/ store — i.e. run the equivalent of 'br init' / create .beads/beads.db + issues.jsonl from the UI, rather than requiring the CLI. Surface an 'Initialize beads' affordance in the beads view when no store is detected for the current project. Server-side goes through BeadsService (apps/server/src/services/beads-service.ts), routes under /api/beads/*. Acceptance: opening the Beads view in a repo with no .beads/ offers an init action; after init, the view shows an empty tracker and subsequent create/list work.

title: Tool-gateway audit: fewer MCP tools, stricter per-role schemas
description: Inventory the ~159 MCP tools; define per-role allowlists and tighten input schemas to reduce mis-use surface (rmax 'tool gateway' pattern).

title: Eval: trajectory-replay runner (npm run eval:harness)
description: Replay the golden set through the current pipeline via AUTOMAKER_MOCK_AGENT (or recorded outputs); emit a deterministic scorecard: success rate, remediation cycles, escalation rate, cost, duration. Depends on the golden set. GH #3904.

title: Verifier: require verification evidence at EXECUTE exit
description: EXECUTE cannot transition to REVIEW without a verification artifact (tests/lint/typecheck ran+passed, tied to the diff). Persist evidence to the trajectory. Configurable per workflow. GH #3906.
